props.videoInjection: try{window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage( JSON.stringify( ({ imageHeaders: { 'Referer': 'https://www.xhamster.com/' }, headers: { 'Referer': 'https://www.xhamster.com/' }, links: initials.videoTagsComponent.tags.map((e)=>({ name: e.name, link: e.url, img: e.thumbUrl, star: e.isPornstar, channel: e.isBrand || e.isChannel })), url: { 'auto': xplayer?.core?.sourceController?.hlsSource}, likes: initials?.videoEntity?.rating?.likes, views: initials?.videoEntity?.views, recommendedVideos: initials?.videoPageComponent?.relatedVideos?.videoTabInitialData?.videoListProps?.videoThumbProps?.slice(0,18).map(e=>({ title: e.title, thumbnailUrl: e.thumbURL, preview: e.trailerURL, src: e.pageURL, duration: new Date(e.duration * 1000).toISOString().substring(e.duration >= 3600 ? 11 : 14, 19) })), ready: true }) ))}catch(e){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage( JSON.stringify({ error: e.message }));}

props.injection: try{ window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify( { list: window.location.hash==='' ? initials.pageStore.popular.trending.items.map((e)=>({ title: e.name, src: e.url, imgSrc: e.thumb })) : initials.pageStore.popular.assignable.find((f)=>f.id===window.location.hash.slice(1))?.items.map((e)=>({ title: e.name, src: e.url, imgSrc: e.thumb })) })); } catch(e) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify( { error: 'Injection Error', message: e.message } )) }
